news.t: AllianzIM to Transfer Exchange Listings and Fund Name Changes
AllianzIM Announces Net Asset Value Restatement for AllianzIM U.S. Large Cap Buffer10 Aug ETF (AUGT)

overview.description: The AllianzIM U.S. Equity Buffer10 Aug ETF (AUGT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust over a specific holdings period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. AUGT was launched on Jul 31, 2023 and is issued by Allianz.
